feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: (My Prison Was) Just An Open Cage
entry.summary:
Author: nerdwegian

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 95,085Chapters: 10/14Kudos: 103

Summary: Eddie is working hard on figuring himself out, getting a life, and also reestablishing contact with Buck after worrying about them drifting apart and their friendship changing. Realizing that sometimes people misunderstand his relationship with Buck should not be the shock it is. Also, if Chris could stop launching verbal sneak attacks on him, he'd appreciate it. Meanwhile, Buck's learning to parent a toddler while not at all being insecure about something said by one Margaret Buckley. He's just studiously avoiding the word 'Parent' like the plague, and otherwise doing his damn best. or If Buck had a nickel for every time someone left him their kid in their will without his knowledge–well, he’d have two nickels. Which isn’t a lot, but it’s weird that it’s happened twice now.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: DamnSterek

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,756Chapters: 20/21Kudos: 952

Summary: Maywhat if we casually start referring to them like a married couple and see how long it takes them to notice RaviOH I’M IN ChimneyI want plausible deniability Chimney left the conversation Harry💀💀💀 MayLMFAO Harryoperation buddie bait is officially a go Maythat is the worst name ive ever heard Raviseconded Harryy’all just threatened by my creativity

entry.title: I Choose You (A 9-1-1 x Pokemon Crossover)
entry.summary:
Author: Unhingedoveractivemuse

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,217Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 186

Summary: Evan Buckley loves Pokémon. From his morning and early afternoons chasing and playing with the family Eevee and the neighbor's Skitty to cuddling with the family Eevee and Maddie's as his sister reads him a bedtime story, the time spent with the amazing creatures are the highlights of his day. Those moments are when he stops feeling lonely. So when, one day, he comes face to face with a Growlithe and is told it's going to be his Pokémon, all his wishes seem to have come true in an instant.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,749Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 272

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,008Chapters: 20/24Kudos: 622

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: Running Back Home
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,812Chapters: 3/12Kudos: 295

Summary: Buck is no stranger to being alone. He spent years fending for himself after leaving the house he grew up in, and even the years before that, he didn’t really have anyone.He thought he had found a family with the 118. He had a captain he came to see as a father, found a mother in Athena and a wider family from his coworkers and theirs. Buck even thought he might have a chance at something more with the man who was his best friend and his son. He should have known better. -+- A post-lawsuit fic (kind of) where Buck leaves and never really had any intention of coming back. The universe has different plans for him though. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: Hold Tight
entry.summary:
Author: Crimsoria

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,857Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 141

Summary: Buck wakes up tied to a post in a barn with Eddie behind him struggling to fight someone. Eddie's hand is squeezing Buck’s. Buck turns to see what's happening: Harley has Eddie in his clutches. Alternative story of S09E13 Mother's Boy and the aftermath.

entry.title: -Seagulls-
entry.summary:
Author: SliceIsCoolz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,034Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: When Eddie invites Buck to the beach with him and Chris. Buck reveals a secret he's been hiding for a while. Eddie is shocked and feeling a little guilty. He tries his best to help Buck overcome this obstacle. Or: Buck’s PTSD surrounding the beach and not just the pier.

entry.title: meet me where i left you
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 111,737Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 930

Summary: Captain Buckley, who is steady, who has his shit together, who definitely does not recognize his new probie because he spent a night eight years ago with his hands in that man's hair whispering things against his skin that would get him fired on the spot if anyone in this building ever found out. "You must be Eddie Diaz." His hand goes out. Not shaking, by some miracle that deserves its own cathedral, its own patron saint, the patron saint of men who are dying inside and shaking hands about it. "Welcome to the 118. It’s nice to meet you, I’m Captain Buckley." Eddie takes his hand. A firm grip, calloused in places Buck doesn't remember, but Buck's skin recognizes him anyway, every nerve, all at once. "Captain." Eddie's voice is level, pleasant, perfectly neutral, and Buck would buy it completely if he couldn't see the tension bolted into Eddie's shoulders. "Thanks for having me." A beat. "You got a first name, Captain Buckley?" "Evan. But most people just call me Buck." "Buck," Eddie repeats, tasting it, dragging it out, and Buck's stomach drops through the floor. "Suits you." Or,Captain Buckley WILL NOT fuck his new probie, okay? At least, not again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I'll bring you home
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,170Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 129

Summary: After a tragic accident leaves Connor and Kameron’s son orphaned, Buck struggles with what role he’s supposed to play in Theo’s life — and whether someone like him could ever be enough for a child. Before he and Eddie can figure any of that out, the 118 is called to an active hostage situation at a Los Angeles junior high school. What starts as another terrifying call quickly turns into every firefighter’s nightmare.

entry.title: my head is full of poison, and my heart is full of doubt
entry.summary:
Author: binding13girl

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,918Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 82

Summary: He is shrouded with emotion as he lies in a hospital bed, alone. His phone in hand with zero missed calls or messages from the day before. He throws his phone down forcefully on the bed. No one thought to check on Eddie when there was an active shooter. No one cared enough to save him. He should’ve died in that elevator.   OR post hospital lockdown eddie questions how much he means to the team, crashes out a bit, and confesses his love to his best friend

entry.title: Found My Missing Piece
entry.summary:
Author: Fanficcrazy93

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 81

Summary: He looks up at the voice and is momentarily caught off guard by the man in front of him. Because he’s… well, he’s beautiful. He can’t explain why his brain decides to zero in on this very insignificant piece of information, at this very inappropriate time, but it does. The man in front of him is drop-dead gorgeous, and Buck feels an irrational need to tell him so.Or: Eddie and Buck have a very different first meeting when Buck is on a train that crashes and Eddie is the firefighter who saves his life.

entry.title: To Whom it May Concern
entry.summary:
Author: xenascully

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,844Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 105

Summary: "But I was literally JUST kidnapped already this year!" Buck argues. Posting as I write.

entry.title: Just give in / Don’t give up Baby
entry.summary:
Author: Whatuppy07

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,660Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: As the weeks have gone by, almost everyone has relaxed around him. They’ve started to trust his assurances that he’s okay, and in turn he’s starting to believe it himself. Really, the only person who doesn’t see his progress is Eddie.Eddie, who was there.Eddie, who drove 10 hours straight despite his own injuries and who didn’t say anything when Buck had a 15 minute panic attack during a thunderstorm on their way back.Eddie, who held Buck's hand in the ambulance when he was delirious with pain and relief. Buck hadn’t been entirely convinced Eddie was real, he thought maybe Eddie was a death bed hallucination — one last comfort before Buck died alone in a shed. At the time, Buck didn’t really care if Eddie was real or not, he was just grateful Eddie’s face would be the last thing he saw. Buck is struggling after New Mexico. Both his mind and his body are fighting against his efforts to move past his kidnapping, continuously dragging him back to a house he never wants to think about again. All he wants is to move on, and he finds it so much easier to ignore the past when pills are involved.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Ocean in My Body (a River in My Soul)
entry.summary:
Author: thetalee

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,494Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 234

Summary: A bible tale comes alive. Fire rains from the sky. It's pretty much a typical day for the 118. But there is change in the air as the leaves begin to change color in preparation for the fall. Everything changes eventually, inevitably. And sometimes a person finds themselves in mourning for something that isn't yet gone.

entry.title: The Gas Leak
entry.summary:
Author: TrustyRobot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,923Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 68

Summary: The Smosh cast is doing a charity livestream for the Trevor Project. Someone in the comments takes the gas leak bit literally. The 118 responds. Buck paints something he won't explain. Chat loses its mind. Chanse has no regrets.

entry.title: Jigsaw Falling into Place
entry.summary:
Author: bubbleaurum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,851Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 252

Summary: “Buck, I don’t want to upset you,” he said. “But can you feel this?” Eddie’s eyes gestured down at his arm. Buck followed along the bandages, expecting to see some sort of spot of red or maybe an odd-angled turn. Instead his heart rose and fell too fast as he realized that since they’d been talking, Eddie hadn’t just had his hand on his shoulder. His other was delicately wrapped in Buck’s exposed fingers, starkly white even against the bedding. Buck tried to move them, wanting so badly, even with all this and even as much as it could give him away, to curl back.They didn’t move.……After a spiral, Buck attempts the unthinkable. Eddie helps him recover, but his lasting injuries present new challenges that jeopardize his career. Now he has to get his mental health in order, face potentially leaving the firehouse, and all while being completely and totally in love with his best friend.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: What still might happen
entry.summary:
Author: amisguidedpoet

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,054Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Buck was the closest thing to art Eddie had seen in years. Of course, Eddie didn’t know that at the time. Back then, Buck was just a stranger with golden hair in an empty gallery, talking about a photograph Eddie knew very well. But looking back now, after everything that happened, after everything Buck became, Eddie could see it clearly: Buck was color. And Eddie hadn’t seen much color in a long time. --- The student/professor AU nobody asked for.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I got tired of being strong
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,561Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Post law suit everything is getting back to normal .everyone has forgiven Buck and he is back where he belongs. So why does he feel so broken? This will be a slow burn exploration of Buck post law suit and how he is really not doing ok. Some things will be canon but it will change. Eventually Buddie but warning it will be a slow burn. Lots of mental health issues and negative thoughts be explored.
